description: Start a local Android Appium session against http://127.0.0.1:4723 using the first matching device or a named device.
when_to_use: User asks to start local Android session
User asks to connect Android emulator or physical device
User explicitly asks for local Android execution (not cloud)
prerequisites: Android emulator or device connected via adb

first_available_device.description: Use the first detected Android device when only one emulator/USB device is available.

named_device.description: Pick a specific device when multiple are connected; device_name matches a substring of the adb device name.

slot_prompts.device_name: If multiple Android devices are listed by adb, which name should we use? Partial match is OK.

examples.query: Start session on my Pixel emulator
